mapper.select: SELECT * FROM exams WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT * FROM exams ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exams (title, description, start_time, end_time, duration, total_score, pass_score, question_count, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{duration}, #{totalScore}, #{passScore}, #{questionCount}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE exams title = #{title}, description = #{description}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, duration = #{duration}, total_score = #{totalScore}, pass_score = #{passScore}, question_count = #{questionCount}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM exams WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exams
SELECT * FROM exams WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT * FROM exams WHERE created_by = #{createdBy}
SELECT * FROM exams WHERE title LIKE CONCAT('%',#{title},'%')
SELECT * FROM exams WHERE status = 1 AND start_time <= #{now} AND end_time > #{now}
SELECT * FROM exams WHERE status = 1 AND start_time > #{now}
SELECT * FROM exams WHERE status = 2 OR end_time <= #{now}
SELECT * FROM exams WHERE start_time >= #{startTime} AND end_time <= #{endTime}
SELECT DISTINCT e.* FROM exams e WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM exam_records er WHERE er.exam_id = e.id AND er.student_id = #{studentId})
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exams WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exams WHERE created_by = #{createdBy}
SELECT * FROM exams ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT * FROM exams ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM exams WHERE id = #{id} AND created_by = #{createdBy}
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM exams WHERE title = #{title}
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM exams WHERE title = #{title} AND id != #{excludeId}
mapper.update: UPDATE exams SET status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE exams SET status = 2, updated_at = #{updateTime} WHERE status = 1 AND end_time <= #{now}
